UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Nov-07-2013 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation is present. Represented by Medina Gomez.
Attorney Michael Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendant Troy Harvey is present.
Attorney Misti M. Schmidt appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Barb Anscher, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of NOV-12-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
